diagnostic_status.recommended_next_action: Proceed to small real-material energy-integration prototype only after material grid convergence strategy is defined.

lattice_convention.source: Default in-plane lattice constant for coherently strained thin-film LNO327 / (La,Pr)327-type films on SrLaAlO4-like substrate. Use as a thin-film working value, not as relaxed bulk La3Ni2O7.

prototype_grid.zero_mode_note: n=0 excluded in Stage 5.11; zero-mode audit is deferred to a later stage.

purpose: Small real-material LNO327 reflection-grid prototype and Casimir-integrand hook-in
